mapper.select: SELECT id, ontology_id, name, display_name, description, primary_key, parent_id, instance_count, interface_names, created_at, updated_at FROM object_type WHERE ontology_id = #{ontologyId} ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT id, ontology_id, name, display_name, description, primary_key, parent_id, instance_count, interface_names, created_at, updated_at FROM object_type WHERE ontology_id = #{ontologyId} AND name = #{name}

SELECT id, ontology_id, name, display_name, description, primary_key, parent_id, instance_count, interface_names, created_at, updated_at FROM object_type WHERE ontology_id = #{ontologyId} AND name = #{name} AND id != #{excludeId}

SELECT id, ontology_id, name, display_name, description, primary_key, parent_id, instance_count, interface_names, created_at, updated_at FROM object_type WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM object_type WHERE ontology_id = #{ontologyId} AND name = #{name}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM object_type WHERE ontology_id = #{ontologyId} AND name = #{name} AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM object_type WHERE ontology_id = #{ontologyId}
